a.label: active chart group G_act = S_3

b.label: DBP surface F(D,S,P) = D^{m_D}+DS+P^{m_P}-3

evidence.label: Keystone as falsification test
evidence.summary: The keystone $m_D = m_P = 2$ was chosen to break the morphology: if the directive cover threw up an $S_3$ or any $3$-cycle when both roles enter quadratically, the ``layer group $=$ extraction-Galois'' law would die. It
